info.description: Administrative API for managing gateways and their registries, policies, consumers and auth credentials.
info.title: AgentGateway Admin API

get.description: Returns build/version information for the running binary.
Reports whether the process is alive.
Reports whether the process is ready to serve traffic.
Returns a paginated list of gateways.
Returns a paginated list of auths in a gateway.

post.description: Creates a new auth in a gateway.

get.description: Returns a single auth by id.

delete.description: Deletes an auth from a gateway.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of consumers in a gateway.

post.description: Creates a new consumer in a gateway.

get.description: Returns a single consumer by id.

delete.description: Deletes a consumer from a gateway.

post.description: Associates an auth credential with a consumer (idempotent).
post.summary: Attach an auth to a consumer

delete.description: Removes the association between an auth credential and a consumer (idempotent).
delete.summary: Detach an auth from a consumer

post.description: Associates a policy with a consumer (idempotent). Editing the policy later affects every consumer it is attached to.
post.summary: Attach a policy to a consumer

delete.description: Removes the association between a policy and a consumer (idempotent).
delete.summary: Detach a policy from a consumer

post.description: Associates a registry with a consumer (idempotent).
post.summary: Attach a registry to a consumer

delete.description: Removes the association between a registry and a consumer (idempotent).
delete.summary: Detach a registry from a consumer

get.description: Returns a paginated list of policies in a gateway.

post.description: Creates a new policy in a gateway.

get.description: Returns a single policy by id.

delete.description: Deletes a policy from a gateway.

post.description: Promotes a policy to gateway-wide scope (applies to every consumer).

delete.description: Demotes a global policy back to consumer-scoped (applies only to linked consumers).

get.description: Returns a paginated list of registries in a gateway.

post.description: Creates a new backend in a gateway.

get.description: Returns a single backend by id.

delete.description: Deletes a backend from a gateway.

get.description: Returns a single gateway by id.

delete.description: Deletes a gateway. Fails if it still has dependent resources.

get.description: Returns the catalog of supported models, optionally filtered by provider.
Returns the catalog of available policies grouped by type. Each entry includes the settings schema needed to render its configuration form dynamically.
Returns the catalog of supported LLM providers.

fields.description: Fields lists the child fields of an object.

item.description: Item describes the element schema of an array.

key_options.description: KeyOptions lists the well-known keys of a map. Empty means free-form keys.

value.description: Value describes the value schema of a map.
